content.en:
Ye Tian has been secretly paying attention to Han Xuan, but Han Xuan doesn't know, after all, Han Xuan is just an eternal controller at the moment, and he is very low-key and very reluctant!

Her strength is obviously very strong, almost invincible in her ranks, but she is very weak.

"This personality is a bit like me!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But after observing for a period of time, he found that there was something wrong with this Han Xuan, the speed of his strength improvement was too fast, and he soon became a half-step perfect controller.

Moreover, among the half-step perfect masters, he quickly comprehended the space-time pole path and other kinds of extreme paths, which was similar to when he was the half-step perfect master of the creation of the extreme realm, and they all comprehended one kind of extreme path.

In the end, Han Xuan comprehended a very special and powerful Extreme Dao, which contained the Extreme Dao of time and space and many Extreme Dao, but it was mainly based on the Extreme Dao of the sword.

"This is not normal, his speed of comprehending the Extreme Extreme Dao is faster than mine!"

Ye Tian knew very well that he had the talent of copying and many Extreme Dao Ancestors on his body, so he had such a fast breakthrough speed!

Moreover, although Han Xuan also had a lot of Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments, he didn't use any treasure resources, how could he be so demonic?

But after a long time, Han Xuan occasionally revealed some flaws, and through these flaws, Ye Tian roughly had some guesses.

"Han Xuan is a reincarnated person!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Reincarnation is not uncommon, they can be reincarnated easily by such beings, but the higher their cultivation, the so-called reincarnation is just abandoning the physical body, only living in a mortal body, and they can resume their cultivation in a single thought.

After all, even if there is one grain left of the Extreme Dao Will, it can be easily resurrected.

Therefore, the so-called reincarnation is no different from pretending to be a mortal.

And Han Xuan's situation is a real reincarnation, abandoning everything, even the will of the Extreme Dao, the kind that only has memory.

"How is this done?"

Ye Tian was curious.

If it could be achieved to this extent, many original ancestors who could not break through in their cultivation would have done so.

After all, some of the original ancestors had an unstable cultivation foundation at the beginning, which led to the inability to break through in the later stage.

If they can be reincarnated, their cultivation will be raised to a higher level, and they will all be demons.

......

this day.

Ye Tian came to visit the Shangling Holy Ancestor, although the Shangling Holy Ancestor was not a sixfold ancestor, but after all, he was the first half-step sixfold ancestor of the Shangling Origin Domain, and he had been to many high-level origin domains, and even had communicative contacts with many high-level origin domains, and his knowledge was definitely extraordinary.

"Endless Holy Ancestor!"

The Upper Spirit Holy Ancestor said very respectfully.

He was a little curious, why did Ye Tian suddenly come to him?

"Holy Ancestor, I have come to ask you for something. "

Ye Tian's words directly shocked the Shangling Holy Ancestor, the half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor was invincible, and even the Endless Saint Ancestor of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor Changbai Dao Ancestor had come to ask him!

What a scary thing this is!

"Endless Holy Ancestor, please speak, I'm afraid I won't be able to solve your confusion!" said the Upper Spirit Holy Ancestor in fear.

Ye Tian asked, "Spiritual Saint Ancestor, if an incomparably powerful Primordial Ancestor wants to reincarnate, abandon everything, re-cultivate, and reshape the foundation, can he do it?"

"How?"

Shangling Ancestor was stunned.

If there is such a way, he wants to cultivate again, maybe there is hope to surpass the present, even if he may not be able to advance to the sixfold ancestor, but the hope is definitely higher!

"There's really no way?"

Ye Tian frowned.

If the Spiritual Saint Ancestor didn't know, he would have to consult the Sixfold Primordial Ancestors, but he wasn't familiar with those Sixfold Primordial Ancestors!

The Spiritual Ancestor was silent for a while, and suddenly said: "It's not impossible, I remember one thing, there was once a sixfold Primordial Ancestor who preached, mentioning reincarnation, under normal circumstances, cultivators with high cultivation have too strong will, beyond reincarnation, reincarnation has no meaning, even if they comprehend the extreme path of reincarnation, they can only reincarnate weak beings, or use them as a means of attack, and they can't let cultivators reincarnate and recultivate in the true sense." Otherwise, the powerful Ancestor will not be able to progress and will be rebuilt, and the rules will be out of order. But there is a situation that may break the reincarnation limit!"

"What's the solution?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Treasures that transcend the extreme path of reincarnation! The Sixfold Ancestor mentioned that the Extreme Extreme Dao is not the limit of the Dao, and it is said that there is a more powerful Dao, but that kind of Dao is already terrifying, not to mention that it still has to be a treasure of the Reincarnation Dao that happens to surpass the Extreme Dao, and it must also be used to assist in the reincarnation recultivation. Therefore, this possibility is almost negligible, even if it reaches the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, it is impossible to do it!" said the Upper Spirit Saint Ancestor.

"Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, there shouldn't be a Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor in our primeval realm, right?" Ye Tian said.

"There is no sevenfold primordial ancestor, the most powerful is the sixfold primordial ancestor, unless there is an accident!" said the Spiritual Saint Ancestor.

"I see!"

Ye Tian left.

......

"Could it be that Han Xuan is the terrifying ancestor who has obtained the treasure above the extreme path of reincarnation, and just happened to obtain that kind of treasure, so as to be reincarnated and recultivated?"

Ye Tian guessed.

He was very curious about Han Xuan, and he even suspected that Han Xuan was not a creature in the primeval realm realm, but a powerhouse in other realms who used the reincarnation treasure to reincarnate here.

"Maybe you can accept her as a disciple, and learn about the situation in other districts through her, maybe you can also learn about some big opportunities!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he prepared to meet Han Xuan.

this day.

Han Xuan is exploring a treasure land in search of resources.

Suddenly, a figure appeared in front of her.

Seeing this person, Han Xuan's expression changed.

Can't see through!

"Definitely the original ancestor!"

Han Xuan said secretly.

With her current strength, there is no hope of survival at all against the previous ancestor.

Although her current body is a clone of the will, an Origin Ancestor may have a way to find her body, and it is not a good thing to offend the Origin Ancestor!

"I've seen my seniors!"

Han Xuan said respectfully.

"You, very good!" Ye Tian smiled.

"I don't know what the seniors commanded?" asked Han Xuan.

"You have a very good talent, I want to take you as an apprentice, what do you think?" Ye Tian asked.

"What?"

Han Xuan was stunned, accept apprentices?

She doesn't want to apprentice!
